Summary

Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams.

Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams.

Experience

  • January, 2020 - Present 6 years, 4 months
    Senior Software Engineer

    <p>&lt;p&gt;Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure.&lt;/p&gt;</p>

    • <p>&lt;p&gt;Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization&lt;/p&gt;</p>
    • <p>&lt;p&gt;Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests&lt;/p&gt;</p>
    • <p>&lt;p&gt;Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans&lt;/p&gt;</p>

  • January, 2017 - January, 2020 3 years
    Full Stack Developer

    <p>&lt;p&gt;Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production.&lt;/p&gt;</p>

    • <p>&lt;p&gt;Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users&lt;/p&gt;</p>
    • <p>&lt;p&gt;Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes&lt;/p&gt;</p>
